changes.description: Initial release of QTS-app dashboard featuring Custom Voice and Voice Clone modes.
Added Personal Voice Library to permanently save and instantly load custom voice characters.
Added 'Instant Clone' (x-vector only) mode to bypass reference text transcription.
Added automatic language selection when choosing a preset character.
Massive full-stack performance optimization utilizing React.memo and FastAPI routers, achieving peak CPU efficiency.
Redesigned UI aesthetic to 'Obsidian & Silk', a lightweight minimal theme replacing heavy graphics with fast, satisfying micro-animations.
Added ability to delete audio items directly from the History Sidebar.
